nasb.text: Therefore let it be known to you that this salvation of God has been sent to the Gentiles; they will also listen.”

esv.text: Therefore let it be known to you that this salvation of God has been sent to the Gentiles; they will listen.”

cnv.text: 所以你們應當知道，　神這救恩，已經傳給外族人，他們也必聽從。”

ccb.text: 所以你们当知道，上帝的救恩已经传给了外族人，他们也必听。”

csbs.text: 所以你们应当知道：神的这救恩已经传给了外邦人，他们反倒会听！”
